'''[[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] Zonka''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] of the [[Imperial Remnant]].

==History==
Zonka was assigned to [[Jerec (Inquisitor)|Jerec's]] [[Vengeance Battle Group|battle group]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]] the group invaded [[Ruusan/Legends|Ruusan]] and after the disappearance of [[Patrol 341]] in the [[planet/Legends|planet]]'s desert, Zonka was among the complement of a [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT]] that was sent to investigate.<ref name="JK">''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight]]''</ref>

The [[walker/Legends|walker]] was under the command of [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]], one of Jerec's [[Seven Dark Jedi|apprentices]] who led the team from an [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-ST]]. The group left from [[Jerec's tower]] and after scanning the Patrol's zone of authority, Yun directed them to a different area to the north where he believed [[Aagon|its leader]] took them. Eventually the walkers reached a suspicious rock pile. A [[company/Legends|company]] of Stormtroopers disembarked with a pair of crawlers. Behind him, someone sprinted and dove behind a rock for cover; seeing that it was his [[Corporal/Legends|Corporal]] [[Niko Smith]], he nodded. Smith complained about the meticulous search over all this distance, and Zonka reminded him his salary and the Empire's "gratitude". [[Squad/Legends|Squad]] by squad, the troops fanned out into the stone-maze as Yun watched from the top of the Scout.<ref name="JK" />

==Personality and traits==
By 5 ABY Zonka was a grizzled officer.<ref name="JK" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight]]'' {{1st}}
